title: Add copr deps
body:
The COPR spec needs to require:
* atomic-registries
* iptables
* containernetworking-cni

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 903f3b7 has been approved by `baude`
